records.title: Medical Records

portal.featureReportingBody: Patient volume, earnings, and satisfaction across clinics.

stub.comingBody: This directory experience is being connected to verified UAE healthcare data.

guestAiChat.assistantLead: Get instant health guidance powered by medical knowledge. For appointments and records,
guestAiChat.inputPlaceholder: Ask me anything about your health...
guestAiChat.keyboardHint: Press Enter to send, Shift+Enter for new line
guestAiChat.disclaimer: This AI assistant provides general health information only and is not a substitute for professional medical advice, diagnosis, or treatment. Always seek the advice of your physician or other qualified health provider with any questions you may have regarding a medical condition.
guestAiChat.welcomeMessage:
Hello! I'm your AI health assistant powered by advanced medical knowledge. I can help you:

• Understand symptoms and health concerns
• Get guidance on when to see a doctor
• Find the right specialist for your needs
• Answer general health questions
• Provide wellness tips

What can I help you with today?
guestAiChat.doctorBannerBody: This is the public health assistant. For your schedule, patients, and prescriptions, use your doctor portal.

dashboard.title: Admin dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: The super-admin cockpit will surface platform health, approvals, insurance, and AI analytics once Phase 3 activates.
dashboard.featureHealthBody: Realtime uptime, error budgets, and regional performance.
dashboard.featureApprovalsBody: Doctor onboarding queue with license and credential checks.
dashboard.featureInsightsBody: Usage, satisfaction, and outcomes across the patient and doctor portals.

compliance.title: Compliance
compliance.subtitle: DOH, DHA, and MOH compliance reporting once audit exports are activated.
compliance.featureAuditBody: Immutable audit trail for every PHI access.
compliance.featureReportsBody: Pre-built DOH/DHA packages with exportable evidence.
compliance.featureIncidentsBody: Track privacy incidents and remediation workflow.

systemHealth.title: System health
systemHealth.subtitle: Live observability into Supabase, edge functions, and third-party integrations.
systemHealth.featureServicesBody: Health of database, auth, storage, and edge functions.
systemHealth.featureLatencyBody: Regional latency histograms and P95/P99 alerts.
systemHealth.featureIntegrationsBody: DOH, DHA, insurance, and payments reachability.

organizations.title: Organizations
organizations.subtitle: Hospital and clinic tenancy management for the platform.
organizations.featureTenantsBody: Provision clinics, assign super-users, and configure branding.
organizations.featureAgreementsBody: BAA and contracting status per organization.
organizations.featureBillingBody: Seat consumption, consult volume, and invoice status.

users.title: Users
users.subtitle: Global user directory with role, status, and onboarding progress.
users.featureDirectoryBody: Search by role, organization, and onboarding status.
users.featureRolesBody: Assign or revoke doctor, nurse, pharmacy, lab, and admin roles.
users.featureImpersonationBody: Audit-logged support impersonation with automatic revert.

diagnostics.title: Diagnostics
diagnostics.subtitle: Diagnostic tooling for platform operators and SREs.
diagnostics.featureJobsBody: Queue health for AI workers, reminders, and report generation.
diagnostics.featureLogsBody: Centralised search across frontend, edge functions, and database logs.
diagnostics.featureFeatureFlagsBody: Toggle MVP, Phase 2, and Phase 3 features per environment.

aiAnalytics.title: AI analytics
aiAnalytics.subtitle: Model usage, safety signals, and outcome metrics for every AI surface.
aiAnalytics.featureUsageBody: Sessions per model, feature, and region.
aiAnalytics.featureSafetyBody: Flagged outputs, user reports, and incident trends.
aiAnalytics.featureOutcomesBody: Correlation between AI guidance and clinician decisions.

dashboard.title: Laboratory dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: A unified workspace for pathologists and lab technicians once the lab role is activated.
dashboard.featureQueueBody: Incoming lab orders sorted by STAT, routine, and in-progress.
dashboard.featureResultsBody: Structured entry with reference ranges and auto-flagging.
dashboard.featureQualityBody: Instrument calibration and QC review workflow.

referrals.title: Lab referrals
referrals.subtitle: Review referrals coming in from clinics across the UAE.
referrals.featureFilterBody: Filter by clinic, doctor, panel, and priority.
referrals.featurePatientBody: Check fasting, prior results, and pre-collection notes.
referrals.featureSlaBody: Track turn-around time commitments per test panel.

resultEntry.title: Result entry
resultEntry.subtitle: Enter verified results with double-entry validation and reference ranges.
resultEntry.featureStructuredBody: Units, reference ranges, and validation per test code.
resultEntry.featureFlagBody: Automatic flagging with override-with-reason audit trail.
resultEntry.featureSignBody: Technician and pathologist review before release.

radiology.title: Radiology workspace
radiology.subtitle: DICOM review, reporting, and peer-review for MRI, CT, X-ray, and ultrasound.
radiology.featureReportsBody: Structured report templates with peer-review handoff.

dashboard.title: Pharmacy dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Dispensing, inventory, and insurance claims for pharmacy operators.
dashboard.featureQueueBody: Pending prescriptions from clinicians across your network.
dashboard.featureInventoryBody: Stock levels, near-expiry alerts, and auto-reorder.
dashboard.featureClaimsBody: Insurance claim submission and member liability.

dispensing.title: Prescription dispensing
dispensing.subtitle: Process approved prescriptions with verification, counseling, and handover.
dispensing.featureVerifyBody: Allergy, interaction, and duplicate therapy checks.
dispensing.featureCounselBody: Structured counseling prompts per drug class.
dispensing.featureHandoverBody: OTP-signed handover to the patient or a trusted delegate.

inventory.title: Inventory
inventory.subtitle: Live inventory with batch, expiry, and procurement workflow.
inventory.featureLotsBody: Expiry, lot numbers, and recall-ready traceability.
inventory.featureStockBody: Demand forecasting informed by prescribing trends.

portal.title: Insurance portal
portal.subtitle: Insurance operator workspace for plans, eligibility, and claims oversight.
portal.featureEligibilityBody: Expose realtime eligibility to partner clinics.
portal.featureClaimsBody: Auto-adjudication, fraud flags, and escalation queue.
